SessionStart.name: load-session-state
SessionStart.description: Load previous session state on startup (iOS session continuity)
SessionStart.command: bash -c 'if [ -f SESSION_STATE.md ]; then echo "=== Previous Session State ==="; cat SESSION_STATE.md; echo "=== End of Session State ==="; fi'

PreCompact.name: save-state-before-compaction
PreCompact.description: Remind Claude to save state before context compaction
PreCompact.command: bash -c 'echo "[PreCompact] Context compaction imminent. Update SESSION_STATE.md with current task status if not already done."'

Stop.name: session-persist-reminder
Stop.description: Remind Claude to keep SESSION_STATE.md current
Stop.command: bash -c 'echo "[SessionEnd] Ensure SESSION_STATE.md reflects current progress for iOS session continuity."'
